name: Citizen First: Putting Zambians First
objective: Promote national unity and economic sovereignty for all citizens.
mainMessage: Our resources, our people: Putting the Zambian citizen at the center of all development.
talkingPoints: Economic Sovereignty: Priority for Zambian contractors and suppliers.
National Unity: Unity across all 73 tribes, merit-based appointments.
Land Ownership: Protecting land for the local people.
Mining Reform: Ensuring local communities benefit directly from mine royalties.

questions.prompt: Do you believe local Zambian businesses are getting enough opportunities?
Which national issue concerns you most right now?
Will you support Citizen First to bring a new direction to our nation?
